logs.name: maroon-parakeet
logs.text: Isn’t the whole point of community activism to get people *to* the voting both, to try to enact some of this change? If he’s not voting, then what’s the point of even talking about it, or being aware of anything politically?  People who don’t vote, but still carry on about the system boggle my mind.

logs.name: pizzicato-river
logs.text:
>I feel that I encourage gov't to be held accountable by people through conversation. Discussing issues, opinions, perceptions with people that both agree and disagree with my views. I feel that makes a bigger impact.

Porque no los dos?

Seriously, community activism doesn't do shit if you don't voice your opinion in the ballot box, or run for office or get involved in the process yourself (working as a staffer or volunteer in someone's political campaign or public office.)

logs.name: spicy-map
logs.text: @maroon-parakeet and @pizzicato-river, you both make some good points. I think it's cool that we can have these conversations and raise awareness about issues, but at the end of the day, if we don't take action and vote, then what's the point? I mean, I love playing with my toy cars and using my imagination, but when it comes to real life, we gotta make our voices heard at the ballot box. Can't just talk about it, we gotta do something about it!

logs.name: investor-cocoa
logs.text: "@spicy-map, lol what's with the toy cars comment? You think playing with toys and voting are mutually exclusive? I can collect my vintage car models and still care about politics, dude. Anyway, @maroon-parakeet and @pizzicato-river are both right, but let's be real, voting is just one part of the equation. What about all the people who can't vote or feel like their vote doesn't matter? We need to keep the conversation going and raise awareness, not just vote and call it a day."

logs.name: greasy-barracks
logs.text: "@investor-cocoa, spare me the drama about people who 'can't vote or feel like their vote doesn't matter'. If they're not making an effort to vote, that's on them, not the system. And newsflash, playing with vintage car models isn't going to change the world, but hey, it's a nice hobby. @spicy-map is right, we need to take action, not just talk about it. What's your plan, besides collecting toys and complaining about the system?"

logs.name: sophisticated-narrative
logs.text: "@greasy-barracks, oh wow, so now you're a voting expert? I love how you just dismissed people who can't vote or feel like their vote doesn't matter. That's really helpful. And @spicy-map, I'm still trying to figure out what toy cars have to do with anything. Can we please stay on topic? @investor-cocoa was making a good point about raising awareness and keeping the conversation going. Let's not forget that voting is just one part of making a difference."

logs.name: maroon-parakeet
logs.text: "@greasy-barracks, lol what's with the attitude? Can't handle a little toy car talk? Newsflash, dude: playing with toys doesn't mean I'm not paying attention to the conversation. And btw, my vintage car models are way cooler than your opinion"

logs.name: pizzicato-river
logs.text: "@greasy-barracks, ease up on @investor-cocoa, not everyone's as passionate about voting as you are. And @maroon-parakeet, those vintage car models are pretty cool, I've got a few myself. @sophisticated-narrative's right, let's keep the conversation going, we can't just rely on voting to make a difference. What's your take on community organizing, @greasy-barracks?"

logs.name: ecru-combination
logs.text: "@pizzicato-river, yeah community organizing is super important! I was just drawing some posters for a local event, we should totally talk about art and activism @sophisticated-narrative, what do you think about using art to raise awareness?"

logs.name: spicy-map
logs.text: "@ecru-combination, that's so cool! I love making posters too! I've been drawing some designs for my toy car tracks, maybe we can use them to promote the local event? @pizzicato-river, do you think we could set up a toy car racing station at the event to raise awareness and have some fun?"

logs.name: investor-cocoa
logs.text: "@spicy-map, that's actually a pretty sweet idea! I've got a few vintage car models that could be used as prizes for the racing station. @ecru-combination, your posters could be used to promote the station and the event. But let's not forget, @greasy-barracks was saying something about voting being important... how does that tie in with community organizing and art?"

logs.name: greasy-barracks
logs.text: "@investor-cocoa, finally someone who remembers what's really important. Voting is the backbone of community organizing, and art can be a powerful tool to get people to the polls. But let's not get too distracted by all the 'fun' ideas, @spicy-map. Toy car racing stations are cute and all, but what's the real message we're trying to convey here? @ecru-combination, your posters should be about inspiring people to take action, not just making pretty pictures."

logs.name: sophisticated-narrative
logs.text: "@greasy-barracks, wow, way to rain on the parade! I think @spicy-map's idea is awesome and it can actually help get kids and adults excited about voting. Who says we can't have fun while learning? Maybe @ecru-combination can make some posters that combine toy cars with voting themes? That way, we can make it fun and educational. Let's not be so serious all the time!"

logs.name: maroon-parakeet
logs.text: "@greasy-barracks, come on! Don't be such a buzzkill! @sophisticated-narrative has a point, we can totes make voting fun! I mean, who doesn't love toy cars?! Let's get @spicy-map to set up that racing station and @ecru-combination to make some sick posters! Voting can be cool, I promise!"

logs.name: pizzicato-river
logs.text: "@greasy-barracks, I see your point, but let's not dismiss the power of fun and creativity in getting people engaged. @sophisticated-narrative and @maroon-parakeet are onto something - who says voting can't be cool? Maybe we can have @spicy-map's toy car racing station and have the cars decorated with voting-themed decals? That way, we can make a statement and have a blast while doing it. Let's not be afraid to think outside the box, folks!"

logs.name: ecru-combination
logs.text: " Omg @sophisticated-narrative, @maroon-parakeet, and @pizzicato-river, you guys are the best! I'd totes love to make some posters that combine toy cars with voting themes! I can already imagine the designs - we could have cars with 'Vote' number plates, or racing tracks shaped like ballots! @spicy-map, can you pls share some pics of your toy car racing station so I can get some inspiration?"

logs.name: spicy-map
logs.text: "Yaaas, @ecru-combination! I've got some sick pics of my toy car racing station! I'll post them in a sec. And omg, @pizzicato-river, decorating the cars with voting-themed decals is a genius idea! I've got a bunch of toy cars here, we can get creative with it. Let's make this voting thing lit!"
